title: Exim Bank – Management Trainee – 05 Posts
shortInfo: Exim Bank Recruitment 2026 offers 05 new vacancies for Management Trainee posts. Eligible candidates with BA / PGDBA / PGDBM / MMS can apply online from 15-05-2026 to 14-06-2026 through the official Exim Bank website, eximbankindia.in.

basic_details.job_title: Exim Bank Management Trainee Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Exim Bank Recruitment 2026 offers 05 new vacancies for Management Trainee posts. Eligible candidates with BA / PGDBA / PGDBM / MMS can apply online from 15-05-2026 to 14-06-2026 through the official Exim Bank website, eximbankindia.in.

how_to_apply: Candidates shall apply online only from 15 May 2026 to 14 June 2026 through the link available at https://www.eximbankindia.in/careers. No other mode of application will be accepted. Candidates are advised to apply well before the closing date and not wait till the last date. Before applying, candidates must scan and keep ready all required documents as per specifications mentioned in the notification.
seo_tags: Export-Import Bank of India Management Trainee Recruitment 2026
